overall.description: First-person exploration through a post-industrial wasteland in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring derelict terrain littered with trash, crashed vehicles, and industrial debris. The camera moves steadily forward past a chain-link fence toward distant factory smokestacks under a dusty, hazy sky, with a large digital billboard and rusted pipes appearing along the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial wasteland perimeter with chain-link fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward through the wasteland, approaching a crashed vehicle wreckage

entered.detail: tall metal security fence running parallel to the path on the left side
tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke in the distant background
large factory structures and warehouses visible through the haze
wrecked futuristic car with red and blue coloring lying on its side
scattered debris and garbage bags accumulated in the wasteland

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desolate industrial wasteland with a chain-link fence running along the left. The camera moves forward through dry grass and scattered trash toward a crashed red vehicle in the distance, while factory smokestacks loom hazily on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle crash site with digital advertising

events.description: navigating around the crashed vehicle wreckage on the right side
large digital billboard with advertisement becomes prominent on the right

agents.ego_description: walking past the crashed vehicle and turning slightly to observe the digital billboard

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screen displaying a woman's face

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and circles the crashed vehicle wreckage, revealing a large digital billboard on the right displaying an advertisement. The chain-link fence continues on the left as the scene transitions from open wasteland to a more cluttered area with dense trash accumulation.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial pipe yard with heavy trash accumulation

events.description: large rusted industrial pipes come into view on the left side
passing the digital billboard and entering an area with large pipeline infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking through dense trash fields, passing large industrial pipes on the left

entered.detail: large diameter rusted metal pipes lying horizontally on the ground

segments.scene_description: Moving past the billboard, the scene reveals large rusted industrial pipes on the left surrounded by dense accumulations of trash bags and debris. The camera continues forward through the most cluttered section of the wasteland, with the chain-link fence still visible in the distance.

events.description: message notification from Elizabeth Perrera appears on the screen

agents.ego_description: continuing through the wasteland as a message notification appears

entered.detail: game interface element displaying 'NEW MESSAGE FROM: ELIZABETH PERRERA' and 'DON'T GET INVOLVED, VINCENT!'

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving through more open terrain as the industrial pipes are left behind. A game UI notification appears in the lower left corner indicating a new message, while the chain-link fence continues along the left side and the distant industrial complex remains visible through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate industrial wasteland that transitions from an open, grassy expanse into a cluttered debris field before returning to open terrain. It begins by moving forward past a chain-link fence and through dry grass toward a crashed red vehicle, with hazy factory smokestacks looming on the horizon. As the camera circles the wreckage, the scene shifts toward a more cluttered environment, revealing a large digital billboard on the right. The movement then carries the camera past the billboard and into a dense accumulation of trash bags and rusted industrial pipes on the left. Finally, the camera leaves the pipes behind to move through more open ground as a game UI notification appears in the lower left corner, while the distant industrial complex remains visible through the haze.
